title: E. coli  growth trend measurement (culture with silver ion)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2g0ql","text":"This protocol helps obtain growth curve of E. coli cultured with concentration gradient of silver ion.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":43,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Grow Escherichia coli overnight and dilute the culture using LB to OD 600 =0.4-0.6.
Add IPTG to cell culture (final concentration 1mM), and incubate the culture 3h at 171 rpm, 37℃ in orbital shaking incubator.
Cells cultures, LB broth and silver nitrate (150μM) are added into 96-well microplate. The recipe is as the following chart: E. coli cultured with concentration gradient of silver ion.
Incubate the microplate in orbital incubator (37℃ 171 rpm) and measure OD 600 by microplate reader every two hours for two days.
creator: Weizhuo.Chen
